name: Multiple Unlocks of a Critical Resource
description: The product unlocks a critical resource more times than intended, increasing semaphore counts beyond correct values or causing undefined behavior with binary locks, potentially leading to race conditions, crashes, or security bypasses.
detection_pattern: CONTROL(lock_release) is called multiple times on the same STORAGE(shared_resource) without matching CONTROL(lock_acquire) for each release. Look for error-handling or early-return paths where unlock is called when the lock is not held.
